aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
Several new device requests have been identified, with existing fingerprints noted for integration:

1. **Bseed E-touch series Zigbee 1-Gang**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3002_jn2x20tg`
   - **Driver**: `switch_1gang`
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/171)

2. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
   - **Driver**: `climate_sensor`
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/184)

3. **Climate Sensor Model TS0201**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_tsgqxdb4`
   - **Driver**: `climate_sensor`
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/183)

4. **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_7y90pany`
   - **Driver**: `climate_sensor`
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165)

5. **Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE284_ne4pikwm`
   - **Driver**: `climate_sensor`
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1360)

6. **BSEED 2 Button Wallswitch**
   - **Fingerprints**: 
     - `_TZ3000_l9brjwau` (Driver: `switch_2gang`)
     - `_TZ3000_qkixdnon` (Drivers: `switch_3gang`, `switch_4gang`)
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1337)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
The following fingerprints are already supported in the main repository:
- `_TZ3002_jn2x20tg`
- `_TZE284_8se38w3c`
- `_TZ3000_tsgqxdb4`
- `_TZ3000_7y90pany`
- `_TZE284_ne4pikwm`
- `_TZ3000_l9brjwau`
- `_TZ3000_qkixdnon`

## Fork Fingerprints to Integrate
No new fingerprints from forks have been identified for integration at this time.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
Several pull requests (PRs) are currently open or closed, which may contain valuable updates:

1. **Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices**
   - **PR Number**: [#180](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)
   - **Status**: Closed

2. **Added TS110E driver**
   - **PR Number**: [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)
   - **Status**: Open

3. **Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202**
   - **PR Number**: [#1166](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)
   - **Status**: Closed

4. **Added 3 new devices**
   - **PR Number**: [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)
   - **Status**: Open

5. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR Number**: [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)
   - **Status**: Open

6. **Update driver.compose.json**
   - **PR Number**: [#1218](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)
   - **Status**: Open

7. **Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json**
   - **PR Number**: [#1195](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)
   - **Status**: Open

This summary provides a concise overview of the current state of device requests, existing support, and ongoing development efforts for the Universal Tuya Zigbee integration.
